info.title: Mosaic Solutions API Doc
info.description:
Mosaic API allows your business to seamlessly integrate your website or app with our POS Systems.

All requests and responses between clients and the API are JSON over HTTPS.

All timestamps in responses are in ISO-8601 format with UTC timezone unless otherwise specified.

tags.name: Webhook Setup
tags.description:
Clients can provide a URL where Mosaic can POST to receive webhook notifications.

### Client Requirements

* The client must provide a valid HTTPS endpoint.
* The endpoint should be capable of handling incoming POST requests with JSON payloads.
* Clients should acknowledge receipt with any **2xx** response.

post.description: Authorize a client to access APIs.

expires_in.description: The number of seconds before the token expires.

access_token.description: The token to be passed on API requests as a header.
